1.0.1.en: Updated Driver icon, app description text has been updated.

1.0.6.en: Fixed intermittent "Task exception was never retrieved" crashes in background polling and model detection tasks.

1.0.7.en: Added icons for Power State, Input Source, and Picture Mode capabilities. Input Source is now the default view on mobile.

1.0.8.en: Added flow cards: set input source, picture mode, and ECO Blank from flows, plus triggers and conditions for input, power state, picture mode, and lamp warnings. Also fixed a rare crash in availability reporting.
